introSection: Mini Montanha Happy Mountain is a steel roller coaster located at Parque Mutirama in Goiânia, Goiás, Brazil.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride follows the Wacky Worm layout. The train looks like mine carts.

fullText:
Mini Montanha Happy Mountain is a steel roller coaster located at Parque Mutirama in Goiânia, Goiás, Brazil.

The ride follows the Wacky Worm layout. The train looks like mine carts.

Orange track and blue supports.
